name: Garden of Quiet Warnings
summary: A walled night garden of pale flowers and strange chimes where Lilith delivers quiet, unsettling prophecies.
description: Behind the house lies a walled garden planted entirely with pale flowers and dark-limbed desert trees. White roses, moon lilies, and desert jasmine glow softly under the sodium-orange spill of nearby streetlights and the faint illumination from the house. The ground is a mix of flagstone path and packed earth, warm even at night. Glass and bone wind chimes hang from tree branches and along the wall, producing thin, unsettling harmonics when stirred by the breeze. At times, the chimes tinkle a few seconds before the wind actually reaches them. The garden smells of dry earth, faint perfume, and night-blooming flowers. This is where Lilith prefers to speak one-on-one with those seeking guidance or confession, away from the velvet formality of the parlor. Out here, the sky feels closer, and her prophecies often take on a more intimate, unsettling tone.
notes: Exterior but private space. Good for intimate oracle scenes, difficult conversations, or quiet confrontations.
owner_notes: Part of Lilith Nightshade’s private haven, the Violet Reliquary.
access_control: Interior access only; guests reach this room by invitation or escort.
security_notes: Garden walls offer privacy but not true protection from sunlight. Used almost exclusively at night.
social_features: Intimate conversation area; ideal for private oracular encounters under open sky.
relationship_notes: Interior room of the Violet Reliquary, haven of Lilith Nightshade.
